hooks.command: osascript -e 'tell application "Warp" to activate' -e 'tell application "System Events" to set frontmost of process "Warp" to true' -e 'do shell script "afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff"'

osascript -e 'display notification "Codex run finished" with title "Back2Vibing"' -e 'tell application "Windsurf" to activate' -e 'tell application "System Events" to set frontmost of process "Windsurf" to true'
